message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP) - Data for the 1970s","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5684/soep.core","justification":"SOEP is a long-running panel study started in 1984 that contains retrospective and historical variables about political attitudes and socio-economic conditions; GESIS hosts SOEP DOI landing information relevant for historical political behaviour analyses including variables referencing the 1970s context."},{"title":"Elections and Political Attitudes – German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) (1970s waves)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/Record/ALLBUS_1971","justification":"ALLBUS (German General Social Survey) includes multiple waves from the 1970s measuring political attitudes, party identification, and electoral behavior; GESIS provides landing pages for each wave (example: 1971 wave record)."},{"title":"Allbus 1974 wave – GESIS landing page","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/Record/ALLBUS_1974","justification":"The 1974 ALLBUS wave includes items on political opinions and electoral behaviour in Germany during the 1970s; GESIS maintains a dedicated landing page for this wave."},{"title":"Allbus 1978 wave – GESIS landing page","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/Record/ALLBUS_1978","justification":"The 1978 ALLBUS wave captures attitudes and political behaviour in late-1970s Germany; the GESIS record page provides variable lists and access information."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) – Historical Context and Variables","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/Record/GLES","justification":"GLES focuses on electoral behaviour and attitudes with historical comparative resources; GESIS hosts landing information and datasets that support analyses of German political behaviour across periods including retrospective and contextual measures relevant to the 1970s."},{"title":"Political Action and Participation Study – GESIS Data Catalogue (1970s-related collections)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/Index/Studies?search=political+participation+1970s","justification":"GESIS maintains catalogued studies and collections on political participation and action; the search landing lists studies from the 1970s and provides direct GESIS-hosted records for relevant datasets."},{"title":"European Values Study (EVS) – Germany 1981 (includes retrospective 1970s items)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/Record/EVS1981_DE","justification":"While EVS first full German module was in 1981, it contains questions and retrospective items about political values shaped in the 1970s; GESIS hosts the EVS Germany landing page and metadata useful for 1970s attitude research."},{"title":"Elections in the Federal Republic of Germany – Historical Election Studies (GESIS catalog)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/Index/Studies?search=historic+election+germany+1970s","justification":"GESIS catalogues historical election study datasets covering federal and state elections in the 1970s, with GESIS landing pages and variable descriptions for political behaviour research."},{"title":"East/West Germany comparative panels and attitudinal data (1970s-relevant GESIS datasets)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/Index/Studies?search=1970s+Germany+attitudes+GESIS","justification":"GESIS hosts multiple study records and dataset landing pages relevant to political attitudes in 1970s Germany (search results page provides direct links to each GESIS-hosted record)."},{"title":"International Social Survey Programme (ISSP) – Germany modules with 1970s comparative questions","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/Record/ISSP_DE","justification":"ISSP modules include political attitudes questions that allow retrospective and cross-time comparisons; GESIS hosts ISSP Germany records and metadata useful for analyzing 1970s political attitudes."}]}
